$comment: ensure_available result envelope v1 — the PINNED cross-repo contract (aba guards it consumer-side; tests/conformance/test_envelope.py guards it here). Changes are deliberate, versioned events.

success.changed: bool — false = pre-check short-circuit, nothing mutated
success.verified: dict[name -> {status: passed|failed|unknown, check, want?, got?, reason?}]
success.env_id: str (env targets; with a `note` — postconditions enforce at realize)

error_hints.$comment: failures use the standard error envelope {error, stage, detail, hints, retryable, meaning}; these keys ride hints
error_hints.attempts: list[attempt] — every lane that ran or was skipped
error_hints.runtime: present even on failure — mutations may have landed

attempt.error: the lane's typed error dict VERBATIM (outcome=failed/refused)
attempt.verify: per-lane got/want when a postcondition failed in-loop (ranked mode)
attempt.spelling: the lane-dialect spelling actually used (ranked mode)
